caption: A man participates in a podcast recording within a studio decorated with framed photos and clothing. In the initial frames, the man wears a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, glasses, over-ear headphones, and a tall, grey, textured wig. He sits before a professional microphone, appearing to speak. The scene then cuts to the same man, but he is now wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT!" on the chest, a black baseball cap, a gold chain, and headphones. He is laughing with his eyes closed while speaking into the microphone. Throughout the clip, on-screen graphics appear in the bottom corners, including a logo that reads "BOSS TALK PODCAST" on the left and "BOSS TALK 101" on the right. The background changes from a wall of memorabilia to a white backdrop featuring the words "HUSTLE" and "BOSS TALK 101" in red and black lettering.
